feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)

entry.title: Absolute Sex Ed for Absolute Idiots
entry.summary:
Author: inkinverse

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,661Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 89

Summary: Kal-El has super senses, zero human sexual experience, and a deeply inconvenient reaction to the way Bruce smells after a fight. Bruce Wayne has open wounds, terrible coping mechanisms, and enough poor judgment to turn “what do you know about sex?” into a hands-on demonstration.

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,124Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 92

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.

entry.title: Not Married Yet!
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,064Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: “Uh,” Bruce hesitated, not sure whether he should tell the public about this. He sighed before giving a polite smile, “Yes,” “I’m married.” He said casually, raising his left hand to show the sparkling ring. - Or, Clark kent has a huge crush on Bruce Wayne and was heartbroken and jealous when he admitted he was married. Only to find out later that Bruce wears the ring to avoid getting inappropriate questions. + Interactive chat for readers and this fic is based on a manhwa called Sugar Trap

entry.title: The Many Stories of The Dark Knight
entry.summary:
Author: Mostlikely

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 469Chapters: 1/50Kudos: 0

Summary: A collection of short stories of our favorite dark knight. This will include: Mostly smut, some fluff, and a little angst for my angst lovers! :3 What do these terms mean? Smut: Erotic/sexualFluff: Platonic/non-sexual/cutesyAngst: This can mean many things. (such as, Unrequited love, a character death, a sad ending, and basically anything else that hurts the character either physically, mentally, or emotionally.)   (Updates may be slow!!)

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,379Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 115

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.

entry.title: Devour Me
entry.summary:
Author: TPWK28HS

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,521Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 96

Summary: That night, Bruce Wayne didn’t just lose his parents… he also lost the ability to taste anything. He awakened as a Folk: nothing fills him, nothing can satisfy the emptiness inside. The Joker takes every chance to tempt him, but his flavor, though intense, is so cloying and nauseating that it pushes Bruce to the edge, making him hate Cakes. Until he tastes him.Clark Kent. A reporter who, by accident, reveals himself to be a Cake. But not just any Cake: to Bruce, he’s addictive, igniting him instantly and leaving him with a single desire… to devour him again. Clark promises to keep the secret, but he runs. Bruce won’t allow it. From that moment on, Kent becomes his obsession. Yet Clark, despite all his empathy, hides an even greater secret: he must conceal that he is Superman. He tries to escape this dangerous game, but when his family’s farm is at risk, Bruce offers him a deal he can’t refuse: save it… in exchange for becoming his sustenance. A convenient arrangement… or the beginning of a bond that will devour everything?

entry.summary:
Author: misschini

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,579Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 55

entry.title: [Podfic] the whole world was here, waiting
entry.summary:
Author: Dr_Fumbles_McStupid

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 104Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 14

Summary: In another universe, a much darker version of Batman has been holding Superman captive for a year. In this one, Bruce was only planning to neutralize an interdimensional threat. He didn’t plan on a rescue mission. He didn’t plan to take home a hurt, broken captive who may or may not be a version of the Clark Kent he knows. But now that he has, he needs to figure out what to do with him without putting the whole planet at risk. It takes Clark a while to realize he hasn’t just traded one abuser for another, more dangerous one.Podfic of the whole world was here, waiting by Neery.

entry.title: We Could Be Heroes - A SuperBat Love Story
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 135,043Chapters: 46/?Kudos: 436

Summary: "I’ve made a lot of mistakes in my life, and for a long time, I thought I’d continue to fall into darkness. But Clark is like a shining light. He inspires me to be a better person.” Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent both maintain a strong sense of justice and fight for peace in their respective cities. However, both are struggling to maintain order alone, and are weighed down by a lost sense of identity and the loneliness that stems from the isolation of living a double life. After a chance encounter, the pair agree to form a Justice League to address the growing threat to Earth's security. As they learn to work together, new feelings blossom, and the heroes soon find themselves leaning on each other for support and comfort. Slow-burn romance. Bat-family drama. Justice League shenanigans. Bruce being a rich kid with issues. Superman being an innocent lad. Your favorite black cat/golden retriever boys are in for a wild ride.

entry.summary:
Author: turqu0ise

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,459Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 122

entry.title: be a simple kind of man
entry.summary:
Author: outboard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,585Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 254

Summary: On a stormy night in Gotham, Bruce's parents appear out of thin air, torn from the past. Between their sudden appearance, his children's insistence on meeting them, and having to explain the kind of man he's become, Bruce is not handling it well. On top of that, there is now a very real possibility that he'll have to come out to his parents. Bruce never imagined he'd ever get the chance—especially not in his mid-thirties—and now that he does, he's terrified."What happened?" he asks, smoothing a bandage over Bruce's stitches with careful, practiced movements. His hands are heavy. Warm. "What made you choose this?" And Bruce is—he's tired, and he's hurting, rubbed raw with simmering grief and overwhelm. Thomas stands over him, close enough to touch, caring for him in ways Bruce has only ever dreamt of for the past twenty-five years. Bruce sighs, quiet and aching and worn. "You died," he confesses. He'd never really been able to lie to his father.

entry.title: Young Gods
entry.summary:
Author: chilling_with_ducks

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,246Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 82

Summary: “He- he can’t- he doesn’t- he’s human?!” “Uh huh.” When she finally manages to salvage some dignity, Superman is already about a foot in the air, smiling something small and unbelievably fond. She scrambles to follow. “Incredible, isn’t he?” Courtney nods vigorously, and then finally registers exactly what it was that Batman had said. “The entire Watchtower?!” Superman actually scoffs. “Yeah. He’s rich rich.”Or:5 times Bruce is human, and how Clark loves him for it.

entry.title: Parent Trap
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,765Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 393

Summary: When Dick Grayson forces Clark to pretend to be his parent for a meeting with his headmaster, Clark expects an awkward conversation and maybe a lecture from Bruce afterward. He does not expect Gotham’s tabloids to decide he and Bruce Wayne are secretly together. But after one too many headlines about Bruce Wayne’s “mysterious co-parent,” pretending to date starts seeming like the easiest solution. That would probably be less of a problem if Clark wasn’t already half in love with him.

entry.title: Heat and Numbers
entry.summary:
Author: frogonadollar

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,752Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 86

Summary: A heatwave induced by Earth's yellow sun has Clark supercharged and delirious beyond belief. The only one he can think of to help him is his best friend and long time crush brilliant, billionaire Bruce Wayne. - It’s too hot, so hot, Clark needs to get his suit off right this instant. He kicks at his boots before pressing the crest on his chest. The whole thing slinks back in and condenses, he puts the charm on the metal table beside him and feels like he can finally breathe. He’s only slightly panting. The room glows red, the monitors brightness the only light unaffected. He feels what he thinks is best closely described as drunk. Or delirious. Whichever shoe fits. The haze over his mind is slowly starting to fade. It’s only when Bruce enters the room that he’s felt any sense of clarity since this morning. Except now, he’s naked. In front of Bruce.

entry.title: The Fifth Letter
entry.summary:
Author: ObsidianWings_Ink

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,776Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 9

Summary: ​In a universe where the gifted attend the prestigious Academy of Superheroes, fifteen-year-old Bruce Wayne is just a powerless orphan from the bleak streets of Gotham. He has sent five letters, pleading for a single chance. He expected another rejection; he didn't expect a confrontation with Roman Sionis to unlock something mysterious in a dark alleyway.​New romances, new friendships, and new adventures await him—along with a tragic event that lies ahead. ​(More tags will be added as the story progresses.)

  • Kal-El | Subject One

entry.title: A brief story of how Tim Drake was outed as a pervert, and eventually cleared his name, to a certain extent.
entry.summary:
Author: CertifiedNightwingLover

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,187Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 36

Summary: One thing leads to another and Tim ends up with a Batman X Superman fanfiction on his screen. Everything's fine, until it isn't. That being, Bruce walks in on him reading said fanfiction. Bruce's interest is piqued and he reads the fanfiction, for safety reasons. Now, Bruce probably thinks Tim is a pervert, given that he can't even stare him in the eye. And Bruce...he has a lot on his mind.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
